headline: International Paper Strengthens Regional Presence through Delmarva Corrugated Deal
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.53%, International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) is included among the Top 10 High Dividend Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts. On May 18, International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) announced that it has expanded its packaging operations with the acquisition of Delmarva Corrugated Packaging in Dover, Delaware. The deal adds another facility […]
